curriculumOverview: Our schools follow the scheme of studies as prescribed in National Curriculum Framework-2005 by the National Council of Edcational Research & Training (NCERT) . The scheme of studies from pre-primary to Middle classes is mentioned below-

evaluationSystem.term1: May to September, culminating in Half-Yearly Examinations.
evaluationSystem.term2: October to March, culminating in Annual Examinations.
evaluationSystem.weightage: Continuous and Comprehensive Evaluation (CCE) including Unit Tests, Assignments, and Term Exams.
